description_long: This is a modern, cubic house with a flat roof and a central open courtyard visible from all sides. The exterior is clad in light-colored horizontal siding, complemented by large, floor-to-ceiling windows and sliding glass doors that provide ample natural light. The front facade features a symmetrical arrangement of tall, narrow windows and a prominent entryway flanked by vertical landscaping elements. The house is surrounded by a paved walkway and a landscaped border with shrubs and trees, enhancing its urban curb appeal. The interior appears to be open-plan, with visible furnishings such as sofas and tables through the expansive windows. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, minimal ornamentation, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, cubic house with a flat roof, large windows, and a central open courtyard, surrounded by landscaped greenery and paved walkways.
description_view_0: This view shows the side of the house with large sliding glass doors and windows, revealing interior furnishings and a glimpse of the central courtyard.
description_view_1: The front view highlights the main entryway, symmetrical tall windows, and a row of vertical trees and shrubs lining the facade.
description_view_2: This side features more large windows and sliding doors, with visible patio furniture and landscaping along the edge.
description_view_3: The rear view displays a mix of large and small windows, a secondary entrance, and a continuous paved walkway along the base.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Central glass double doors with a paved approach, flanked by tall vertical windows and a row of decorative trees
